basic_details.job_title: NHM Balangir Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for MO, Physician and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Balangir (NHM Balangir) Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS Notification 2026 has been released on the official website balangir.odisha.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the NHM Balangir Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, MD in Medicine (preferred), Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine (preferred)
qualification.details: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE: MBBS degree from an institution recognized by Medical Council of India with valid registration from the Odisha Council of Medical Registration. Candidates with MD in Medicine/Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine from any recognized University/Institution will be preferred. MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM: MBBS or equivalent degree from Medical College or Medical Institution recognized by Medical Council of India with valid registration certificate under Odisha Medical Registration rule 1965.

content_sections.heading: NHM Balangir Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NHM Balangir Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NHM Balangir Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM

content_sections.heading: NHM Balangir Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE: MBBS degree from an institution recognized by Medical Council of India with valid registration from the Odisha Council of Medical Registration. Candidates with MD in Medicine/Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine from any recognized University/Institution will be preferred. MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM: MBBS or equivalent degree from Medical College or Medical Institution recognized by Medical Council of India with valid registration certificate under Odisha Medical Registration rule 1965.

content_sections.heading: NHM Balangir Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: NHM Balangir Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE: Rs.86,116/- pm + Others allowances as per PIP MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM: Rs.57,409/- pm + Others allowances (PM-ABHIM)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NHM Balangir Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHM Balangir recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date, which is 13th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Physician/Consultant Medicine post?
faq.answer: For the Physician/Consultant Medicine post, candidates need an MBBS degree and are preferred to have an MD in Medicine or a Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years for all the advertised posts.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the MO MBBS post?
faq.answer: The MO MBBS post offers a salary of Rs. 57,409/- per month plus other allowances under the PM-ABHIM scheme.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NHM Balangir recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held in Balangir, Odisha. The exact venue address should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contractual basis.
